pi_items.source: C172 refers to Cessna 172, a well-known single-engine aircraft. 'Runup' is a standard aviation term for pre-takeoff engine checks. Verified through aviation documentation searches and Cessna 172 checklist resources.

Confirmed as standard preflight checklist item across multiple Cessna 172 checklists. Found in CESSNA_172_CHECKLIST.pdf and other official documentation specifying 'Doors – CLOSED/LATCHED' as a required check.

Confirmed in Cessna 172 runup procedures. Standard magneto check involves setting magnetos to BOTH position before testing individual LEFT and RIGHT magnetos. Found in multiple C172 runup checklists including engine startup and runup sections.

Confirmed as standard Cessna 172 checklist item. Carburetor heat must be set to COLD (fully in) on the ground to prevent ingestion of foreign contaminants, and before takeoff. Found in multiple Cessna 172 Normal Operating Procedures and takeoff checklists.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a custom aviation checklist in the Avare app (com.ds.avare), a legitimate free open-source aviation GPS application with 100K+ installs. The checklist title 'C172 Runup' refers to a Cessna 172 aircraft pre-takeoff runup checklist. All three items—'Doors Closed', 'Mags Both', and 'Carb Heat Cold'—are authentic, standard checklist items from official Cessna 172 runup and pre-flight procedures. The Avare app supports custom checklist creation as documented in its GitHub repository (github.com/apps4av/avare). This is an interactive UI task with no external data sources; it tests an agent's ability to navigate the app interface and create a checklist.
